bug.description: power control error causing incorrect transmit power level

prompt:
There is a power control error causing incorrect transmit power level downstream of function trx_eth_read_raw_IF4p5 in the radio/ETHERNET subsystem.
The function is located at radio/ETHERNET/eth_raw.c:323.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
